title: Amino Acid Residues in the GIY-YIG Endonuclease II of Phage T4 Affecting Sequence Recognition and Binding as Well as Catalysis
summary: The paper focuses on the biochemical characterization of Phage T4 endonuclease II (EndoII), a GIY-YIG endonuclease, including its structure modeling, mutagenesis, expression, purification, and enzymatic activity assays. No morphological or structural details about the T4 virion itself are provided.
